summary: Tested RetailPro Products Page CRUD functionality - Add/Edit/Delete products with enhanced fields. Backend APIs (PUT, DELETE /api/products/{id}) fully tested with pytest - 12/12 tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified via screenshots showing product cards with edit/delete overlay icons, Add Product modal (QuickAddProductModal), Edit modal with pre-populated data, and Delete confirmation modal.

integration_issues.issue: Customer-first flow requires selecting customer before viewing products on POS page (/tabs/products). Recommend testing via Admin Products page (/admin/products) which has direct access

Backend_POST_products_all_fields.details: Create with cost_price, sku, min_stock (low_stock_threshold), unit

Backend_PUT_products_all_fields.details: Update name, price, cost_price, stock, sku, unit

Backend_DELETE_verify_removal.details: Verified product removed from database after delete

Frontend_QuickAddProductModal.details: Modal has isEditMode and initialData props for edit support. Shows all fields: name, price, cost_price, stock, min_stock, sku, unit, item_type, category

Frontend_Edit_Delete_buttons.details: Product cards have edit (create-outline icon) and delete (trash-outline icon) buttons with data-testid attributes. Edit opens QuickAddProductModal in edit mode with pre-populated data

Frontend_Product_Detail_Modal.details: WebModal shows full product info with edit/delete buttons (data-testid='detail-edit-btn', 'detail-delete-btn')

Frontend_Delete_Confirmation.details: WebModal with warning, delete confirmation (data-testid='confirm-delete-btn'), and cancel option

critical_code_review_comments: Backend PUT /api/products/{id} endpoint (lines 3705-3764) is fully functional with proper authorization (admin, manager, superadmin)
Backend DELETE /api/products/{id} endpoint (lines 3766-3789) working correctly with proper ownership check
Frontend products.tsx has comprehensive edit/delete functionality with proper state management (editingProduct, isEditMode, deletingProduct)
QuickAddProductModal correctly handles edit mode via isEditMode and initialData props
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: Code verified - UI elements present with proper implementation

seed_data_creation: Test products created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product CRUD (PUT, DELETE /api/products/{id}) backend APIs fully tested with pytest - all 12 tests pass. Frontend products.tsx has edit/delete icons on product cards with data-testid='edit-product-{id}' and 'delete-product-{id}'. QuickAddProductModal supports edit mode via isEditMode prop. Admin Products page (/admin/products) shows products in table view with edit/delete icons in ACTIONS column. POS Products page (/tabs/products) uses customer-first flow and shows products in card grid view.
